name: X_srw_chemoreceptor_cluster
description: X-linked srw (serpentine receptor, class W, FMRFamide-related peptide receptors) chemoreceptor cluster on the C. elegans X chromosome left arm. Includes srw and srx subclasses interleaved with srz paralogs. Tandem duplications combined with gene conversion create dense paralog blocks at 70-95% identity.
